headline.text: Cleaning tools discovered inside *L3 ML4 T5 flow wrapper* at startup — no investigation or hold documented.

summary: One high-severity event: cleaning tools found inside T5 flow wrapper at L3 ML4 startup with no follow-up investigation or hold visible in chat. Separately, L2 ML3 forming plate guides were swapped between lines, potentially affecting product specifications.

food_safety.title: Cleaning tools found inside T5 flow wrapper
food_safety.summary: Operator discovered cleaning tools loose inside T5 flow wrapper housing when cover was opened at startup — direct foreign material contamination risk with no investigation or hold mentioned.
food_safety.status: Open, no follow-up investigation or disposition action documented in chat.

quality.title: Forming plate guides swapped between ML2 and ML3
quality.summary: ML2 and ML3 forming plate guides were installed on wrong lines during changeover — incorrect guides could affect product dimensions and specifications.
quality.status: Open, no indication of corrective action or product review in chat.

opportunities.text: Consider part-number verification step when installing forming plate guides — based on ML2 and ML3 guides swapped during changeover today.
Consider adding tool accountability checklist before closing food-contact equipment covers — based on cleaning tools found loose inside T5 flow wrapper at ML4 startup.
Consider adding belt installation verification to ML4 startup checklist — today's TG#4 downtime and speed reduction trace to Friday's operator installation error despite prior training post.
